title: Ionas #2495
definition:
Jonah or Jonas = "dove"

 1) the fifth minor prophet, the son of Amittai, and a native of
    Gath-hepher and lived during the reign of Jeroboam II, king of Israel
 2) Jonas, the father of Peter
